title: The Passports Act, 1967
full_text: The Passports Act, 1967 पासपोर्ट अधिनियम, 1967 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 196715 Act Number: 15 Enactment Date: 1967-06-24 Act Year: 1967 Short Title: The Passports Act, 1967 Hindi Title: पासपोर्ट अधिनियम, 1967 Long Title: An Act to provide for the issue of passports and travel documents, to regulate the departure from India of citizens of India and other persons and for matters incidental or ancillary thereto. Ministry: Ministry of External Affairs Enforcement Date: 24-06-1967 TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Passports Act, 1967 Show all section Section 1. Short title and extent. Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Passport or travel document for departure from India. Show Related Subordinates Section 4. Classes of passports and travel documents. Section 5. Applications for passports, travel documents, etc, and orders thereon. Section 6. Refusal of passports, travel documents, etc. Section 7. Duration of passports travel documents. Section 8. Extension of period of Passport. Section 9. Conditions and forms of passports and travel documents. Section 10. Variation, impounding and revocation of passports and travel documents. Show Related Subordinates Section 10A. Suspension of passports or travel documents in certain cases. Section 10B. Validation of intimations. Section 11. Appeals. Section 12. Offences and penalties. Section 13. Power to arrest. Section 14. Power of search and seizure. Section 15. Previous sanction of Central Government necessary. Section 16. Protection of action taken in good faith. Section 17. Passports and travel documents to be property of Central Government. Section 18. [Omitted]. Show Related Subordinates Section 19. Passports and travel documents to be invalid for travel to certain countries. Show Related Subordinates Section 20. Issue of passports and travel documents to persons who are not citizens of India. Section 21. Power to delegate. Show Related Subordinates Section 22. Power to exempt. Show Related Subordinates Section 23. Act to be in addition to certain enactments. Show Related Subordinates Section 24. Power to make rules. Show Related Subordinates Section 25. Change of short title of Act 34 of 1920. Section 26. Omitted. Section 27. Repeal and saving.
